# AI Alert

> An incident and vulnerability tracker for AI/ML systems. Covering CVEs, model exploits, supply chain threats, and real-world AI security incidents — tracked, sourced, and dated.

## Docs

- [About](https://ai-alert.org/about): Editorial standards, coverage scope, and team.
- [Archive](https://ai-alert.org/posts): Full archive of all incident reports and analyses.
- [RSS Feed](https://ai-alert.org/rss.xml): Subscribe to new entries via RSS.
- [Sitemap](https://ai-alert.org/sitemap-index.xml): Full site sitemap for crawlers.

## Topics

- [CVE Roundups](https://ai-alert.org/posts): Weekly digests of AI/ML CVEs from NVD and vendor advisories.
- [Incident Deep-Dives](https://ai-alert.org/posts): Analysis of real-world AI security incidents.
- [Jailbreak & Prompt Injection](https://ai-alert.org/posts): Taxonomy and case studies of LLM exploits.
- [Supply Chain Threats](https://ai-alert.org/posts): Risks from model files, dependencies, and HuggingFace.
